info.title: Kanvaro API
info.description: Generated from Next.js route handlers under src/app/api. Authentication is primarily cookie-based, but bearer JWT is supported for API testing.

bearerAuth.description: Use a JWT access token. The app also supports cookie-based auth (accessToken/refreshToken).

cronSecret.description: Cron endpoints may be protected by a shared secret (Authorization: Bearer <secret>).

ApiSuccess.description: Standard API success envelope. Some endpoints may include extra fields (e.g., pagination).

ApiError.description: Standard API error response. Many endpoints return { error } without a success flag.

description.example: Investigate redirect behavior when refresh token expires

allOf.description: Task update payload. Most fields are optional; server applies validation rules.
Project update payload. Most fields are optional.
